notes: The issue with the menu is quite easy to fix, you just need to go to ~.steam/steam/steamapps/common/RESIDENT EVIL REVELATIONS 2/nativePCNext/movie/ui/" an d rename the file extension to .mov, now the menu will be visible and working. But about the game: it keeps stuttering and even the mouse movement is very sluggish, i tried to deactivate esync and everything was on low, but the stutter was heavy, at the moment i have no idea how to fix this
title: Resident Evil Revelations 2 / Biohazard Revelations 2

notes: Even after renaming main_menu_00.wmv all I get after loading a game is a loading screen and sound effects. I tried both 64 and 32-bit wineprefixes, wmv video fix like in RE 1&0 remasters (it helps for video files though), various versions of Proton, Proton GE and Wine, DXVK and d9vk, no use.
title: Resident Evil Revelations 2 / Biohazard Revelations 2

notes: Besides the UI fix needed listed below, all the FMV cut-scenes do not play, only the audio and subtitles. There are large hang ups during gameplay often, walking down a hall can get you up to five of these which grind the game to a halt. Disabling Esync did not seem to help much at all.
title: Resident Evil Revelations 2 / Biohazard Revelations 2
